journeys.title: Account Deletion (Full Cascade)
journeys.description: Full account deletion cascade: shop ownership gate, storage cleanup (avatars, listing photos, hero banners), slug cleanup, auth user deletion with FK cascades and DB triggers.

nodes.label: Check if user owns active shops

errorCases.result: 409: Must transfer or delete shops first — show shop names as links

nodes.label: Delete member avatar from profile-assets bucket
Delete listing photos from listing-images bucket
Delete shop avatars from profile-assets bucket
Delete shop hero banners from profile-assets bucket
Delete shop listing photos from listing-images bucket
Delete member slug from slugs table
BEFORE DELETE trigger: handle_member_deletion() — release member slug + owned shop slugs
CASCADE: cart items, recently viewed, shop memberships deleted

journeys.title: Account Settings & Profile Completeness
journeys.description: Account settings page with sections for personal info, fishing identity, notifications, seller settings, shipping addresses, linked accounts, and profile completeness tracking.

nodes.label: Personal Info: edit display name, bio (280 chars), upload avatar (200x200 WebP)
nodes.notes: Change email triggers OTP flow — see email-change.json.

nodes.label: Fishing Identity: select species (multi), technique (multi), home state, years fishing
Seller Settings: toggle seller on/off — see seller-toggle.json
Danger Zone: Delete Account — see account-deletion.json
Check fields: has avatar, has bio, has fishing identity, has display name
Show suggestions for missing fields (if not 100%)

journeys.title: Saved Shipping Addresses
journeys.description: Buyer manages up to 5 saved shipping addresses with CRUD operations, default address management, and auto-promotion on delete.

options.label: No — empty state: 'Add your first address'

nodes.label: AddressList: cards with label, address, default badge
Enter: label, line1, line2, city, state, zip, is_default
If deleted was default, next address auto-promoted to default

journeys.title: Authenticated Cart (DB-Backed)
journeys.description: Authenticated buyer adds items to DB-backed cart with price snapshots, 30-day expiry, seller grouping, and pre-checkout validation.

nodes.label: Show item states: valid, price changed (old vs new), removed/sold (warning)
Actions: remove item, clear all, refresh expiry

journeys.title: Checkout (Escrow via Stripe Connect)
journeys.description: Buyer checkout with Stripe Connect escrow payments. Funds held until buyer confirms receipt. NOT BUILT — planned for post-MVP.

nodes.label: Check if seller has Stripe Connect onboarded
Escrow hold — funds captured but not transferred

journeys.title: Recently Viewed (Dual-Source)
journeys.description: Recently viewed listings use dual-source storage: localStorage for guests, DB-backed API for authenticated users. Includes merge on login and clear history.

journeys.title: Buyer Search & Discovery
journeys.description: Authenticated buyer discovers listings via search with autocomplete, category browsing, or homepage featured. Includes filters, infinite scroll, view tracking, and recently viewed.

nodes.label: Suggestions from popular search terms, listing titles, category names
Filter panel with category, condition (6 tiers), price range, state, species, listing type, free shipping
All filters stored in URL params (shareable)

journeys.title: Context Switching (Member / Shop Identity)
journeys.description: Identity system overview: member/shop context switching via Zustand store, X-Nessi-Context header on every request, localStorage persistence, page load rehydration, and edge case handling.

nodes.label: User logs in — default context: { type: 'member' }
Check if user belongs to shops
Navbar shows context switcher dropdown (if shops exist)
switchToShop(shopId, shopName) — Zustand: { type: 'shop', shopId } — X-Nessi-Context: shop:{shopId}
Persisted to localStorage — survives refresh, tab close, re-open
Create listing (member): listing.member_id = user.id, shop_id = null — appears on /member/[slug]
Create listing (shop): listing.shop_id = shopId, member_id = null — appears on /shop/[slug]
Shop settings (shop): accessible based on role
No stored context — default to { type: 'member' }
Stored member context — set context: member
Stored shop context — set context: shop:{id}
Shop deleted while user in shop context — next API call — 403 — revocation
Role changed (e.g., owner to contributor) — API checks role per request, UI may show stale permissions until refresh
Multiple tabs in different contexts — localStorage sync via StorageEvent, both tabs update
localStorage cleared or incognito — defaults to member context

journeys.title: Email Change (Authenticated + OTP)
journeys.description: Authenticated user changes their email address from account settings. Requires OTP verification sent to the new email.

nodes.label: changeEmail(newEmail) — OTP sent to NEW email

journeys.title: Guest Browse & Discover
journeys.description: Unauthenticated user browses the marketplace by category, keyword search, or featured listings. Views listing details, seller profiles, and shop pages.

nodes.label: Filter: condition, price, state, species, listing type
nodes.notes: All filters stored in URL params (shareable).

nodes.label: Apply filters: condition, price, state, species, listing type
Click seller profile link on listing detail
Click shop page link on listing detail
See shop's listings grid + hero banner

journeys.title: Guest Cart → Login → Merge
journeys.description: Guest adds items to localStorage cart, logs in, and cart silently merges to the database.

nodes.label: Client-side validation (own listing, already in cart, cart full)
Add item to localStorage cart (listingId + priceCents snapshot)
nodes.notes: Guest cart is entirely localStorage-backed. No API calls.

nodes.label: CartIcon badge count updates via Zustand store

options.label: No — show empty state + browse CTA

nodes.label: Items grouped by seller for display
Render cart items with remove/clear actions
nodes.notes: Checkout button is disabled in MVP.

nodes.label: useCartMerge() detects auth state change
nodes.notes: This is a background hook — the user sees nothing. It fires on login regardless of what page they're on.

nodes.label: POST /api/cart/merge with guest items
nodes.notes: Server validates every guest item: checks listing exists, not sold, not own listing, not already in DB cart.

nodes.label: Skip invalid/duplicate/own-listing items
nodes.notes: No errors surfaced to user — invalid items are silently dropped.

nodes.label: Insert valid items into cart table (DB)
Clear localStorage guest cart
nodes.notes: No toast, no redirect. Entirely silent. User's cart page now shows DB-backed items.

journeys.title: Guest Recently Viewed
journeys.description: Guest's listing views are tracked in localStorage, deduped and capped at 30 items. On login, views silently merge to the database.

nodes.label: Guest views merged to DB, deduped on server

journeys.title: Login (Email + Password)
journeys.description: Existing user logs in with email and password. Triggers background cart merge and recently-viewed merge as side effects.

nodes.label: User clicks Log In → navbar modal opens
useCartMerge() — merge localStorage cart to DB
nodes.notes: Silent. No toast. Fires on any auth state change. See guest-cart.json for full flow.

nodes.label: useRecentlyViewedMerge() — merge localStorage views to DB
nodes.notes: Silent. POST /api/recently-viewed/merge. Deduplicates on server.

nodes.label: User verifies email, then logs in again

journeys.title: Logout
journeys.description: User logs out, clearing session cookies, resetting context store, and redirecting to homepage.

nodes.label: Context store reset to member
nodes.notes: Zustand store reverts to default member context.

journeys.title: Onboarding Wizard (Buyer vs Seller Path)
journeys.description: Branching wizard after first signup. Buyer path (4 steps) vs Seller path (5 steps). Includes post-onboarding seller opt-in for users who initially chose buyer.

nodes.label: Step 2: Intent — How will you use Nessi?
Step 4: Seller Type — free profile or shop
How do you want to sell? Free profile or Create a shop

journeys.title: Password Reset (3-Step OTP)
journeys.description: User resets forgotten password via a 3-step flow: enter email, verify OTP code, set new password.

journeys.title: Route Protection (proxy.ts)
journeys.description: proxy.ts intercepts every request to enforce auth on /dashboard/* routes, redirect completed onboarding users, and refresh session cookies on public pages.

nodes.label: Skip auth check for /api/*, /_next/*, /auth/* — pass through
getUser() — verify JWT from cookies for /dashboard/* routes
Check if path is /onboarding and onboarding_completed_at is set
Redirect already-onboarded users away from /onboarding to /
Allow authenticated user through to dashboard
Refresh session cookies on public pages, allow through

journeys.title: Seller Context (Member vs Shop)
journeys.description: Listings are created under either member or shop context, controlled by the X-Nessi-Context header. Determines where the listing appears publicly.

nodes.label: Check active context from Zustand store
Member context: seller_id = user.id, member_id = user.id, shop_id = null
Shop context: seller_id = user.id, member_id = null, shop_id = activeShopId
Listing appears on member's public profile at /member/[slug]
Listing appears on shop's public page at /shop/[slug]
X-Nessi-Context header sent with every fetch
member — API validates: user owns listing
shop:{id} — API validates: user is member of shop

journeys.title: Listing Lifecycle (Create, Edit, Manage)
journeys.description: Full listing lifecycle: 5-step create wizard with photo upload, edit wizard with partial saves, dashboard management with status tabs, and listing actions (publish, sold, archive, duplicate, delete).

nodes.label: Listing in draft state — requires 2+ photos to publish
nodes.notes: localStorage persistence for create wizard.

nodes.label: PATCH status=active — publish, sets published_at
nodes.notes: Visible in search, browse, shop page. Editable until sold.

nodes.label: PATCH status=archived — hide from search
nodes.notes: Hidden from search. Kept for history. Can be reactivated.

nodes.label: Step 1: Photos — upload via POST /api/listings/upload
nodes.notes: Sharp: resize 1200x1200 max + 400x400 thumb. Stored as WebP in listing-images bucket.

nodes.label: Step 3: Details — title, brand, description, species, state, listing type
Step 4: Pricing (dollars → stored as cents) + Shipping options

options.label: Publish — PUT + PATCH status=active, published_at set

nodes.label: Same 5-step wizard as create, tracks changedFields for partial save
nodes.notes: No localStorage persistence for edit mode.

nodes.label: Add new photos or delete existing (DELETE /api/listings/upload/delete)
nodes.notes: Remaining photos re-sequenced after deletion.

nodes.label: Filter by tab: Active, Drafts, Sold, Archived
Active listing actions: Edit, Mark Sold, Archive, Quick Edit Price, Duplicate
Duplicate → POST /api/listings/[id]/duplicate → new draft with copied fields
nodes.notes: Opens at Step 1 — needs photos.

nodes.label: Draft actions: Continue editing, Delete draft (hard delete)

journeys.title: Listing Social Sharing
journeys.description: Share listing via Web Share API (mobile) or clipboard copy (desktop). Handles API availability, cancellation, and clipboard permission gracefully.

nodes.label: Click ShareButton in action bar on listing detail page
Check if Web Share API is available
navigator.share({ title, url }) — native share sheet opens (mobile)
nodes.notes: AbortError from user cancellation is silently ignored.

nodes.label: Toast: 'Unable to copy link' (clipboard access denied)

journeys.title: Seller Toggle (On/Off)
journeys.description: User toggles seller status on or off from account settings. Toggling off requires no active listings or orders, and hides all listings from search.

nodes.label: Click toggle OFF in Seller Settings
Show warning: X active listings, Y orders — must resolve first

journeys.title: Create Shop
journeys.description: User creates a new shop via onboarding, dashboard, or seller opt-in modal. Includes slug generation, availability check, and atomic server-side setup (slug reservation, shop row, owner membership, seller flag).

nodes.label: User reaches shop creation form via onboarding, /dashboard/shop/create, or seller opt-in modal
Add owner to shop_members with owner role

journeys.title: Shop Invite → Accept (or Register & Auto-Accept)
journeys.description: A user receives a shop invite email, lands on the invite page, and either accepts directly (if authenticated) or registers a new account with auto-accept.

nodes.label: Enter recipient email + select role
nodes.notes: RoleSelect dropdown filters out Owner role. Validates via validateInviteInput().

nodes.label: POST /api/shops/[id]/invites
nodes.notes: Requires requireShopPermission('members', 'full'). Enforces 5-member cap (members + pending invites).

errorCases.condition: Duplicate pending invite for same email

nodes.label: Insert shop_invites row with 7-day expiry token
Send invite email via Resend with /invite/{token} link
nodes.notes: Email failure is logged but does NOT block the 201 response. Invite is still created.

nodes.label: User lands on /invite/[token]
nodes.notes: Server component fetches invite data via admin client. Invalid token → 404.

nodes.label: Show invite details + 'Accept Invitation' button
nodes.notes: Shows shop name, avatar, inviter name, assigned role.

nodes.label: POST /api/invites/[token]/accept
nodes.notes: Uses cookie session auth (no X-Nessi-Context header). Looks up invite by token via admin client.

nodes.label: Insert shop_members row with invite's role_id
Redirect to /dashboard + success toast
nodes.notes: Member now sees shop in navbar context switcher dropdown.

nodes.label: Show 'Sign Up' and 'Sign In' buttons (no Accept yet)
nodes.notes: Sign Up navigates to ?register=true&invite={token}

nodes.label: Navbar useEffect detects ?register=true&invite={token}
nodes.notes: Stores inviteToken in component state, opens register modal, cleans URL params.

nodes.label: User enters 6-digit OTP code → verifyOtp(type='signup')
nodes.notes: inviteToken is threaded: Navbar → RegisterForm → OtpInput via props.

nodes.label: acceptShopInvite(token) called automatically
nodes.notes: Called inside OtpInput after verifyOtp succeeds. Failure is NEVER blocking — account creation always completes. Error → toast suggesting manual acceptance.

nodes.label: Toast: 'You've joined {shopName}!' + redirect to /dashboard
nodes.notes: onInviteAccepted callback fires in Navbar, shows toast, navigates.

journeys.title: Shop Member Journey (Join, Work, Leave)
journeys.description: Shop member lifecycle: switch to shop context, work within role-based permissions, leave shop with confirmation, and handle context revocation when removed by owner.

nodes.label: X-Nessi-Context: shop:{shopId} set on all requests

options.label: Owner/Manager — access shop settings, manage members, edit any listing
Contributor — edit own listings only, no settings/members access

nodes.label: Create listing in shop context — shop_id set, visible on shop page
Access based on role: Owner/Manager get settings + members, Contributor gets own listings only
Switch back to personal: switchToMember() → X-Nessi-Context: member
Non-owner sees and clicks 'Leave Shop' button
nodes.notes: Leave button NOT shown for owners — must transfer ownership first.

nodes.label: Type confirmation phrase: 'I {name} want to leave {shopName}'
Modal closes, user in member context
Owner removes member from shop via API
Member's next API call includes shop context
ContextRevocationListener → Toast: 'You have been removed from shop'
Navbar dropdown lists all shops + personal profile
Select identity: personal, or any shop (with role)
Persisted to localStorage — survives page refresh

edges.opt: Owner/Manager — access shop settings, manage members, edit any listing
Contributor — edit own listings only, no settings/members access

journeys.title: Shop Member Management (Invite, Remove, Roles)
journeys.description: Owner manages shop members: invite via email, resend/revoke invites, remove members, and assign roles with permission enforcement.

nodes.label: Server-side checks: member cap, existing member, duplicate invite
Send invite email via Resend with /invite/{token} link
Regenerate token + reset expiry to 7 days
Resend invite email with new token
If member was in shop context: 403 on next API call → context revocation
nodes.notes: See context-switching.json for revocation safety net.

nodes.label: Each member row has RoleSelect dropdown (disabled for owner)

journeys.title: Shop Ownership Transfer (Request → Accept → Cancel)
journeys.description: Owner initiates ownership transfer to another member. Transferee receives email link, accepts on a dedicated page. Includes atomic role swap and cancellation flow.

nodes.label: Select new owner from current members
Send ownership transfer email with /shop/transfer/{token} link
Pending status card shown with transferee name + expiry
Server component fetches transfer via admin client — validate status, user, expiry
Atomic swap: shops.owner_id → new owner, new owner role → OWNER, old owner role → MANAGER, transfer status → accepted

journeys.title: Shop Roles & Permissions
journeys.description: Roles & Permissions page showing system role cards (Owner, Manager, Contributor) with permission matrix. Custom roles gated behind premium plan.

nodes.label: ShopRouteGuard checks user role
nodes.notes: Contributors are redirected to /dashboard.

nodes.label: CustomRoleUpsellModal opens — premium plan gate (not yet available)

journeys.title: Shop Settings & Deletion
journeys.description: Shop settings page with sections for details, hero banner, subscription (planned), and shop deletion with full storage cleanup.

nodes.label: Type shop name to confirm deletion

journeys.title: Signup (Email + OTP)
journeys.description: New user registers with email and password, verifies via 6-digit OTP code, and gets a session. Includes invite auto-accept, cart merge, and recently-viewed merge as background side effects.

nodes.label: User clicks Sign Up → navbar modal opens
Enter email + password
nodes.notes: Client-side validation: email format, password min 8 chars.

nodes.label: POST /api/auth/register (admin client creates user)
nodes.notes: Uses admin client to create user, bypassing email confirmation flow. Triggers Supabase to send OTP email.

nodes.label: Form transitions to OTP input (same modal, no page change)
verifyOtp(type='signup') → session established
nodes.notes: On success, Supabase sets session cookies.

nodes.label: Check if invite token was present in URL params
nodes.notes: Token was stored in Navbar state from ?register=true&invite={token}. Threaded to OtpInput via props.

nodes.label: acceptShopInvite(token) — join shop automatically
nodes.notes: Only fires if invite token present. Failure never blocks — account is always created. See shop-invite-acceptance.json for full flow.

nodes.label: useCartMerge() — merge localStorage cart to DB
nodes.notes: Silent. No toast. Fires on any auth state change. See guest-cart.json for full flow.

nodes.label: useRecentlyViewedMerge() — merge localStorage views to DB
nodes.notes: Silent. POST /api/recently-viewed/merge. Deduplicates on server.

nodes.label: Check onboarding_completed_at on member record
nodes.notes: If null → onboarding banner appears. If set → user stays on current page.
